mapping.description: List of touchpoint-to-screen mappings that determines which payment reminder screen to display. The app iterates this list to find a matching touchpoint (falling back to "default"), then looks up the corresponding screen by name from the screens array. Changing entries controls which screen variation a user sees for a given touchpoint.

subscription_status.description: Not consumed in current source code — the getOfferScreen implementation does not read this field. Changing it has no visible effect.

screen.description: The screen name used to look up the matching entry in the screens array by its screen_name field. Accepted values must exactly match a screen_name value defined in the screens array. Changing this value redirects the touchpoint to a different screen configuration, altering the entire bottom-sheet content (title, subtitle, description, banner, buttons).

subscription_statuses.description: Not consumed in current source code — the getOfferScreen implementation does not read this field. Changing it has no visible effect.

touchpoint.description: Identifier for the entry point or context that triggers the payment reminder screen. The app matches this against the touchPoint parameter passed from the calling code; if no exact match is found, it falls back to the entry with touchpoint value "default". Changing this value changes which app context triggers this particular screen mapping.

enabled.description: Not consumed in current source code — the getOfferScreen implementation does not check this field when resolving screens. Changing it has no visible effect.

screens.description: Array of screen configurations for the payment reminder bottom-sheet dialog. Each entry defines the visual content for initial and post-click states. The app selects one screen from this array based on the screen_name matched through the mapping array. Adding or removing entries changes which screen variations are available for touchpoint routing.

selected_data.description: Screen content displayed after the user taps the main action button. The handleButtonClick method calls initScreenData with this data, replacing the title, subtitle, description, banner, and button text. If null, tapping the main button has no visual transition effect before the dialog auto-dismisses.

button.description: Configuration for the main action button shown in the post-click (selected) state. The button text is updated from this object's title after the user taps the initial button. The background_color is not re-applied in the selected state (only used during initial setup).

background_color.description: Not re-applied in the selected state — the button background color is only set during initial setup from initial_data. Changing this value has no visible effect.

title.description: Text configuration for the button label in the selected state. The button text is updated to this title's text value after the user clicks the main button.

color.description: Not consumed in current source code — the mapper reads this field but the button text color is not applied from it (button uses its own styling). Changing it has no visible effect.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — the PaymentReminderScreenMapper does not read this field. Changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: The label displayed on the main action button after the user taps it in the selected state. Accepts any string. Changing this value updates the button text shown briefly before the dialog auto-dismisses (after ~2.5 seconds).

subtitle.description: Subtitle text block displayed below the title in the selected (post-click) state. Shown in the titleDescView TextView. If the text is empty, the view remains in its previous state.

color.description: CascadeColorPackage path string that sets the subtitle text color in the selected state. Resolved via getColorOrPackageBy with a fallback to CascadeColorPackage.TextColors.base. Accepts any valid CascadeColorPackage path (e.g. "TextColors.base", "PrimaryColors"). Changing this value alters the subtitle text color shown after the user taps the main button.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — the PaymentReminderScreenMapper does not read this field. Changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: The subtitle text displayed in the selected state. Shown in the titleDescView below the title. If non-empty, the view becomes visible and displays this text. Changing this value updates the subtitle content shown briefly before the dialog auto-dismisses.

banner.description: Media banner displayed at the top of the bottom-sheet in the selected state. Rendered via a MediaView component that supports multiple media types. The banner is re-initialized with this data after the user taps the main button.

type.description: The media type of the banner content, controlling how the MediaView renders it. Accepted values (case-sensitive via @SerializedName): "image", "video", "gif", "lottie", "reviews". When set to "lottie", the animation plays once (looping is disabled). Changing this value alters the rendering mode of the banner media.

url.description: URL pointing to the banner media resource (image, video, GIF, or Lottie animation file). Passed to MediaView as the data source. Changing this value replaces the banner visual shown in the selected state.

description.description: Description text block shown below the subtitle in the selected (post-click) state. Rendered in the descView TextView.

color.description: CascadeColorPackage path string that sets the description text color in the selected state. Resolved via getColorOrPackageBy with a fallback to CascadeColorPackage.TextColors.base. Changing this value alters the description text color after the user taps the main button.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — the PaymentReminderScreenMapper does not read this field. Changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: The description text displayed in the selected state. Shown in the descView below the subtitle. If non-empty, the view becomes visible and displays this text. Changing this value updates the description content shown after the main button is tapped.

title.description: Title text block displayed prominently at the top of the content area in the selected (post-click) state. Rendered in the titleTextView.

color.description: CascadeColorPackage path string that sets the title text color in the selected state. Resolved via getColorOrPackageBy with a fallback to CascadeColorPackage.TextColors.base. Changing this value alters the title text color shown after the user taps the main button.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — the PaymentReminderScreenMapper does not read this field. Changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: The title text displayed in the selected state. Shown in the titleTextView at the top of the content. If non-empty, the view becomes visible. Changing this value updates the title shown briefly before the dialog auto-dismisses.

screen_name.description: Unique identifier for this screen configuration, used to match against the screen field in the mapping array. Implements the Identifiable interface. The value must exactly match the screen value in a mapping entry for this screen to be selected. Changing this value breaks or creates the link between a touchpoint mapping and this screen's content.

initial_data.description: Screen content displayed when the payment reminder bottom-sheet first appears. The initScreenData method populates the title, subtitle, description, banner, and button from this data. If null, the bottom-sheet shows no content.

button.description: Configuration for the main action button in the initial state. Controls the button text and background color. Tapping this button triggers analytics, transitions to selected_data content, shows a checkmark icon, and auto-dismisses the dialog after ~2.5 seconds.

background_color.description: CascadeColorPackage path string used to set the button's background color. Resolved via getColorOrPackageBy with a fallback to CascadeColorPackage.PrimaryColors. The button uses ButtonType.FILLED style. Changing this value alters the main action button's background color in the initial state.

title.description: Text configuration for the main action button label in the initial state.

color.description: Not consumed in current source code — the mapper reads this field but the button text color is not applied from it (button uses its own internal styling from ButtonType.FILLED). Changing it has no visible effect.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — the PaymentReminderScreenMapper does not read this field. Changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: The label displayed on the main action button in the initial state. Accepts any string. Changing this value updates the call-to-action text the user sees on the primary button when the bottom-sheet first appears.

subtitle.description: Subtitle text block displayed below the title in the initial state. Shown in the titleDescView TextView when the bottom-sheet first appears.

color.description: CascadeColorPackage path string that sets the subtitle text color. Resolved via getColorOrPackageBy with a fallback to CascadeColorPackage.TextColors.base. Changing this value alters the subtitle text color on the initial payment reminder screen.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — the PaymentReminderScreenMapper does not read this field. Changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: The subtitle text displayed when the bottom-sheet first appears. Shown in the titleDescView below the title. If non-empty, the view becomes visible. Changing this value updates the subtitle seen by the user on first open.

banner.description: Media banner displayed at the top of the bottom-sheet in the initial state. Rendered via a MediaView component. This is the first visual element the user sees when the payment reminder dialog appears.

type.description: The media type of the banner content, controlling how the MediaView renders it. Accepted values (case-sensitive via @SerializedName): "image", "video", "gif", "lottie", "reviews". When set to "lottie", the animation plays once (looping is disabled). Changing this value alters the rendering mode of the banner media.

url.description: URL pointing to the banner media resource (image, video, GIF, or Lottie animation file). Passed to MediaView as the data source. Changing this value replaces the banner visual shown when the bottom-sheet first appears.

description.description: Description text block shown below the subtitle in the initial state. Rendered in the descView TextView when the bottom-sheet first appears.

color.description: CascadeColorPackage path string that sets the description text color. Resolved via getColorOrPackageBy with a fallback to CascadeColorPackage.TextColors.base. Changing this value alters the description text color on the initial payment reminder screen.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — the PaymentReminderScreenMapper does not read this field. Changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: The description text displayed when the bottom-sheet first appears. Shown in the descView below the subtitle. If non-empty, the view becomes visible. Changing this value updates the descriptive paragraph seen by the user on first open.

title.description: Title text block displayed prominently at the top of the content area in the initial state. Rendered in the titleTextView when the bottom-sheet first appears.

color.description: CascadeColorPackage path string that sets the title text color. Resolved via getColorOrPackageBy with a fallback to CascadeColorPackage.TextColors.base. Changing this value alters the title text color on the initial payment reminder screen.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — the PaymentReminderScreenMapper does not read this field. Changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: The main title text displayed when the bottom-sheet first appears. Shown in the titleTextView at the top. If non-empty, the view becomes visible. Changing this value updates the headline the user sees on first open.

skip_button.description: Configuration for the secondary skip/dismiss button displayed below the main action button. Tapping it fires a 'close' analytics event and dismisses the bottom-sheet. If null, the skip button has no text or color applied.

color.description: CascadeColorPackage path string that sets the skip button's text color. Resolved via getColorOrPackageBy with a fallback to CascadeColorPackage.PrimaryColors. The button uses ButtonType.TEXT style. Changing this value alters the skip button's text color.

text.description: The label displayed on the skip button. Accepts any string (e.g. "Skip", "Not now"). Changing this value updates the dismiss button text the user sees at the bottom of the payment reminder dialog.

tree.role: Compose-based activity displaying subscription management screen with payment card, benefits, and cancellation options.

children.role: Drives the subscription management screen by fetching screen data and analytics info via use cases.
Interface defining management screen data retrieval and feature-enabled check.
Implements web subscription management logic, builds screen entity from remote config and user subscription state.
Interface for fetching web subscription management screen data, price info, and renewal info.
Reads web subscription management config from remote settings and fetches price/renewal data from API.
Implements mobile subscription management logic including on-hold state, tier resolution, and package pricing.
Reads mobile subscription management config from remote settings.
Data entity holding management screen UI state including payment card info, benefits, packages, and accent color.
Holds tier type and subscription status for analytics tracking on the management screen.
Bottom sheet fragment showing the payment reminder UI with banner, title, description, and action button.
Fetches payment reminder screen data by touchpoint and exposes it as StateFlow for the fragment.
Interface defining the contract for checking if the payment reminder flow is enabled.
Delegates to repo to fetch payment reminder screen data and check if the flow is enabled.
Reads PaymentReminderApiModel from remote settings, resolves touchpoint screen, and maps to entity.
Maps PaymentReminderScreens API model to PaymentReminderScreenEntity including banner, button, and text fields.
API model for subscription banner with type (image/video/gif/lottie) and URL.
@FeatureStart API model deserialized from remote settings key payment_reminder_screen containing touchpoint mappings and screen configs.
UI entity holding mapped payment reminder data including skip button, initial data, and selected data states.
Shared API model for text configuration with text, color, and extra field used in payment reminder screens.
Shared API model mapping touchpoints to screen names and subscription statuses for offer routing.
Interface providing screenName property implemented by PaymentReminderScreens for touchpoint resolution.
Koin DI module binding SubscriptionManagementUseCase implementations, repos, and ViewModels for web and mobile management.
Koin DI module providing PaymentReminderScreenMapper, RepoImpl, UseCaseImpl, and HalfViewModel bindings.
